reason: Current Fluid ScenarioConfig and validators support UMX1 energy_conserving_exchange_v1 and TSWFC2 distributed_wall_fluid_nodes_v1, but no axial_mixing_mode, axial_mixing_multiplier, axial_mixing_parent_segments, or axial-mixing ledger contract exists.

first_smoke_scope_after_patch.rows: disabled baseline plus one low bounded AMX1a multiplier

do_not_do_next: Do not rerun the same four-node TSWFC2 candidate as an unlock attempt.
Do not launch a UMX1 exchange-only score grid.
Do not score Salt1-4 or external/holdout rows before AMX1 smoke passes.
